data.description: These are special rolls made by a player character when they have the highest ability score in a contest or challenge.
for covering 50 per hours, can one as aclion gain benefils localion, you end oplion an lo lhe flyingmessenger, 25 for animaIs. or miles olher one.

Time: action
Range: feel
30
Components: M(a of V,S, morsel food)
Duration: hours

This spell summons a beast within range. You choose the beast you see, which must be within 30 feet and visible and audible to you. If the beast's Intelligence is 4 or higher, it can choose whether or not to be charmed by you for the duration of the spell. Otherwise, the beast must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the duration of the spell. If you harm the beast significantly, this charm ends.

At Higher Levels: When cast using a slot of 2nd level or higher, you can target one additional beast for each slot level above 1st.

Time: 
Range: feel
30
Components: V,S
Duration:

You can use your action to transform any creatures you see within Voutransform that are of challenge rating 4 or lower into a smaller form. You can choose a different form for each target and the transformation lasts until the target is reduced to 0 hit points, drops to unconsciousness, or the effect ends on subsequent turns. The large creature's statistics are replaced by those of the beast, but it retains its alignment, ability scores (including Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma), and hit points. If it transforms into a form with a lower number of hit points, excess damage carries over to normal form. As long as it has no hit points in either form, it is unconscious.
